# HRSC Knowledge Base

> Internal knowledge base for the HR Service Centre covering EMEA HR processes,
> Workday Quick Reference Guides, and Standard Operating Procedures.
> Maintained by HRSC advisers and administrators.

## About this knowledge base

The HRSC Knowledge Base contains three types of articles:

- **KCS Articles** — Problem/resolution pairs following KCS v6 structure (Issue, Environment, Resolution, Cause)
- **QRGs (Quick Reference Guides)** — Step-by-step Workday how-to guides with navigation paths
- **SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)** — Formal process documents with roles, responsibilities and procedures

All articles are tagged with applicable EMEA countries and HR categories.

## Machine-readable data

Full structured export of all published articles (plain text, semantically labelled sections):

    GET /api/kb/export

Returns JSON with all published articles. Each article includes:
- `article_num` — unique reference (KB-0001 format)
- `article_type` — kcs | qrg | sop
- `type_label` — human-readable type name
- `title` — article title
- `category` — HR category name
- `countries` — applicable EMEA countries
- `tags` — keyword tags
- `url` — direct link to the article (e.g. https://yoursite.com/knowledge?article=UUID)
- `sections` — object with named sections (e.g. {"Resolution": "...", "Issue": "..."})
- `workday_path` — Workday navigation path (QRGs only)

### Filters

    GET /api/kb/export?type=kcs               # KCS articles only
    GET /api/kb/export?type=qrg               # Quick Reference Guides only
    GET /api/kb/export?type=sop               # SOPs only
    GET /api/kb/export?updated_since=2025-01-01T00:00:00Z  # incremental sync

### Search

    GET /api/kb/articles?search=QUERY&status=published&limit=20

Returns articles matching QUERY across title, all section content and tags.

## Categories

- Onboarding & Offboarding
- Payroll & Compensation
- Benefits & Wellbeing
- Leave & Absence
- Performance & Development
- Policies & Compliance
- Workday Guides & QRGs
- SOPs
- Recruitment & Hiring
- EMEA Country Guides
- General HR Queries

## Coverage

EMEA countries: United Kingdom, Germany, France, Netherlands, Switzerland, Austria,
Belgium, Ireland, Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, Italy, Spain, Portugal, Poland,
Czech Republic, Hungary, Romania, Turkey, South Africa, UAE, Saudi Arabia.
